packages.name: Levoit Air Purifiers, Humidifiers, and Fans
packages.description: Hubitat drivers for Levoit smart devices via VeSync cloud API. Supports air purifiers (Core 200S/300S/400S/600S, Vital 100S/200S), humidifiers (Classic 300S, Superior 6000S, OasisMist 450S), and fans (Tower, Pedestal).
